title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion, a system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their outputs, identifies knowledge gaps, and synthesizes them into a unified response. A budget Fusion configuration achieved performance close to Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, an OpenRouter system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their outputs, identifies knowledge gaps, and synthesizes the results into one unified response. It positions Fusion against Fable 5: a budget Fusion configuration reached performance close to Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost. The takeaway is that an ensemble and routing approach can approximate a strong single model's quality while cutting spend, with cost-quality tradeoffs set by the chosen configuration.
